title: Function Call Step-Through
description: Students trace the execution flow of a function call - from the call site, into the function with its parameters bound, through each line of the body, acro
creator: Moving Rainbow
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Moving Rainbow
chapter_title: Python Functions, Modules, and Programming Best Practices

learningObjectives: Students trace the execution flow of a function call - from the call site, into the function with its parameters bound, through each line of the body, across the return statement, and back to the caller - using a concrete NeoPixel example.

assessmentOpportunities: Students explain the demonstrated relationship in their own words.
